thag16.1:1.1:
The bandit chief:
“Those who for the sake of sacrifice for the sake of wealth
thag16.1:1.2: we have killed in the past,
thag16.1:2.1: But you— you show no fear;
thag16.1:2.4:
in the face of what’s greatly to be feared?”
Ven. Adhimutta:
thag16.1:3.3: In one whose fetters are ended,
thag16.1:4.1: With the ending of [craving] the guide to becoming,
thag16.1:4.2: when phenomena are seen for what they are,
thag16.1:4.3: then as in the laying down of a burden,
thag16.1:5.1: I’ve lived well the holy life,
thag16.1:5.3: Death holds no fear for me.
thag16.1:5.4: It’s like the end of a disease.
thag16.1:6.1: I’ve lived well the holy life,
thag16.1:6.3: seen states of becoming as devoid of allure,
thag16.1:6.4: like poison spit out after it’s drunk.
thag16.1:7.1: One gone to the far shore without clinging,
thag16.1:7.4: as if freed from a place of execution.
thag16.1:8.3: as if released from a burning house,
thag16.1:9.2: wherever a state of becoming’s obtained,
thag16.1:9.3: all that has no one in charge:
thag16.1:10.2: as taught by the Awakened One,
thag16.1:10.3: would no more grasp hold of any state of becoming
thag16.1:10.4: than he would a hot iron ball.
thag16.1:11.3: Fabrications will simply go out of existence.
thag16.1:11.4: What’s to lament there in that?
thag16.1:12.1: For one who sees, as it actually is,
thag16.1:13.3: as on a par with grass & twigs,
thag16.1:13.4:
finding no ‘mine-ness,’ thinking,
‘There’s nothing of mine,’ he feels no sorrow.
thag16.1:14.4: and there will not be another.
thag16.1:15.1: Do as you like with this carcass.
thag16.1:16.3: the young men threw down their weapons & said:
thag16.1:17.2: or who have you taken as mentor?
thag16.1:17.4:
is this lack of sorrow acquired?”
Ven. Adhimutta:
thag16.1:19.4: is this lack of sorrow acquired.”
thag16.1:20.1: The bandits, hearing the good words of the seer,
thag16.1:20.2: threw down their swords & their weapons.
thag16.1:20.3: Some relinquished their life of crime,
thag16.1:21.1: Having gone forth in the teachings of the One Well-Gone,
thag16.1:21.2: developing the strengths & factors for awakening,
thag16.1:21.3: wise, happy, exultant in mind, their faculties ripened,
